The real value of semantic models isn’t DAX, its understanding of the business
videos.description: Every Power BI semantic model contains critical business knowledge, calculations, and assumptions that are often locked inside the head of the person who built it. This walkthrough follows a real-world scenario where a report owner needs to update an executive dashboard without access to the original model author.

videos.title: With AI, going slow is the dangerous move #AI #productivity #mindset #technology
videos.description:
Think about learning to ride a bike. When you go slow, it is almost impossible to balance, and every wobble makes you want to slow down even more. Speed up, and the balance suddenly comes to you. Kids fight this instinct constantly. They are sure that slower means safer, when the opposite is true.

AI works the same way. Hanging back and moving cautiously feels like the responsible choice, but it is the one that leaves you wobbling and falling behind. The steadiness comes from leaning in and goi

videos.title: The AI skill nobody talks about (and it isn't prompting) #AI #prompting #productivity #tech
videos.description:
Two people sit down with the exact same chatbot on the exact same Tuesday. The first types a quick request for a slide deck, gets back something about eighty percent right, and spends the rest of the morning fixing it.

The second spends eleven minutes writing a real specification first, hands it off, and treats the model like an autonomous agent instead of a chat window. Then they go make coffee. They come back to a finished deck that hits every bar they set, and they do it five more times befo

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Modernized Gallery view in Teams Rooms on Android
items.description: The updated Gallery view in Teams Rooms on Android prioritizes video on the meeting stage, arranges participants in consistent aspect ratios, and minimizes movement of participant tiles on stage. Users can hide the room self-preview video and choose to see audio and video participants equally on stage, instead of prioritizing video participants. Admins can choose the default behavior using local device settings and the Pro Management portal.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot Studio: Enable express mode for flows invoked by an agent or app
items.description: Express mode ensures agents and apps receive timely and reliable responses by dramatically accelerating flow run times. This reduces flow failures, improves user experience, and eliminates costly interruptions caused by timeout issues. Organizations benefit from more dependable automations, higher adoption, and smoother operational workflows.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Specify who has control of production tools in Teams meetings and events
items.description: A new meeting option for Teams meetings with presenters and events that enables organizers to designate 'Who has control of production tools' during the event. Users defined here will have access to the controls in 'Manage What Attendees See' and the ‘Green Room'.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Ability for IT admins to customize the user notification messages for recording and transcription in calls
items.description: This feature enables IT admins to customize a portion of the user notification messages for recording and transcription during Teams calls.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: New controls for quick views in the chat list
items.description: The new chats and channels experience introduced quick views at the top of the chat and channels list. These are views into mentions, followed threads and more. This update allows users to choose when and how these quick views are shown. Users will have options such as always show, always hide and show only when unread. Users will also be able to collapse the quick views section.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Personal message reminders for chat and channels
items.description: Teams now lets you set and manage reminders directly on chat and channel messages, helping you keep track of important items. Create, update, complete, and delete reminders, track them in a dedicated Reminders view, and receive timely notifications when they become due. Reminders are private to each user and include message context, making them easy to revisit and act on when needed.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention - AI Powered Data Loss Prevention Policy Optimizer
items.description: DLP Policy Optimizer uses AI to analyze your organization’s DLP policies, rule structure, and activity signals to identify optimization opportunities that are difficult to detect manually. It highlights overlapping rules, redundant conditions, misconfigurations, and sources of excessive noise, and presents prioritized recommendations with supporting evidence and suggested actions. This enables you to reduce false positives and alert noise, improve policy precision, and simplify policy management

items.title: Outlook: Copilot Settings in classic Outlook for Windows
items.description: You will now be able to access different Copilot settings directly in classic Outlook for Windows.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Structured Document Generation with Forms
items.description: Structured Document Generation with Forms enables organizations to create, manage, and generate standardized documents at scale with built-in governance and compliance in SharePoint. Business process owners can centrally build and maintain form-driven templates -- such as contracts, agreements, proposals, and HR documents -- ensuring content stays accurate and up to date. Users can then generate the right document every time by just filling out the form, without manual formatting, versioning iss

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Frontier and Microsoft agent user request approval flow in Microsoft 365 admin center
items.description: For Admins, agents in the Frontier program can be managed through the Microsoft 365 Admin Center. They are listed under the agents & connectors tab in Copilot Control System, where you can view all agent inventory for your organization. Agents built by Microsoft and available in the Frontier program will be displayed in the Agent Store. This feature will support users to request these agents if blocked by organizational policies. Admins will have the opportunity to further approve and reject the

items.title: Outlook: Import calendars and contacts from PST file to mailbox in new Outlook for Windows
items.description: With this update of support for .pst files (a.k.a. Outlook Data File) in the new Outlook for Windows, users will be able to import calendars and contacts from .pst file to mailbox. Future releases of new Outlook will expand the support for .pst file capabilities. #newoutlookforwindows #pstfilesupport.

items.title: Outlook: Import calendars and contacts from PST file to mailbox in new Outlook for Windows
items.description: With this update of support for .pst files (a.k.a. Outlook Data File) in the new Outlook for Windows, users will be able to import calendars and contacts from .pst file to mailbox. Future releases of new Outlook will expand the support for .pst file capabilities. #newoutlookforwindows #pstfilesupport.

items.title: Outlook: Read-only access to contacts within a PST file in new Outlook for Windows
items.description: With this update of support for .pst files (a.k.a. Outlook Data File) in the new Outlook for Windows, users will be able to browse and read contacts within a .pst file. Future releases of new Outlook will expand the support for .pst file capabilities. #newoutlookforwindows #pstfilesupport.

items.title: Outlook: Import emails from PST file to mailbox in new Outlook for Windows
items.description: With this update of support for .pst files (a.k.a. Outlook Data File) in the new Outlook for Windows, users will be able to import emails from .pst file to mailbox. Future releases of new Outlook will expand the support for .pst file capabilities. #newoutlookforwindows #pstfilesupport.

items.title: SharePoint: AI citations analytics for documents and pages
items.description: AI citations analytics will help you track the usage of SP documents, news and pages through copilot and AI agents. You will be able to see how often a page or a file is referenced in a copilot response. You can also get insights into SharePoint site content getting referenced in copilot responses aggregated at the site level.
